meta.title: TiDB Cloud Startup Program | $100k Credits & Support
meta.description: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program to launch fast and scale without limits. Get $100,000 in cloud credits, technical support, and go-to-market resources.

sections.headline: Launch Fast. Scale without Limits. $100,000 in TiDB Cloud Credits
sections.subheadline: Apply now and start building with the distributed SQL database that grows with you—from MVP to millions of users.

items.label: Cloud Credits
items.description: Free credits to cover your infrastructure costs for up to 12 months.

items.label: Faster Time to Market
items.description: Deploy serverless databases in seconds, not days.

items.label: SLA Guarantee
items.description: Enterprise-grade reliability for your critical workloads.

items.label: Community Access
items.description: Connect with founders, investors, and technical experts.

sections.title: Everything You Need to Scale
sections.subtitle: Our startup program provides more than just credits. We offer the tools and support to help you succeed.

items.title: Massive Cloud Credits
items.description: Receive up to $100,000 in TiDB Cloud Serverless credits to fuel your growth without worrying about infrastructure bills.

items.title: Technical Support
items.description: Get direct access to TiDB engineers and solution architects for architecture reviews and troubleshooting.

items.title: Go-to-Market Support
items.description: Leverage our marketing channels, co-marketing opportunities, and investor network to reach your target audience.

items.title: Serverless Architecture
items.description: Eliminate capacity planning. TiDB Cloud automatically scales compute and storage based on your workload.

items.title: Developer Resources
items.description: Access exclusive tutorials, documentation, and sandbox environments to onboard your engineering team quickly.

items.title: Recognition & Awards
items.description: Featured opportunities in our startup spotlight and potential inclusion in industry award nominations.

items.quote: The $100k credits from the TiDB Cloud Startup Program allowed us to scale our user base by 500% without worrying about our infrastructure budget.
items.author: CTO, FinTech Unicorn

items.quote: TiDB Serverless gave us the flexibility to handle massive data spikes during our product launch. The support team was incredibly responsive.
items.author: Founder, AI Analytics Startup

items.q: Who is eligible for the TiDB Cloud Startup Program?
items.a: The program is open to early-stage startups (typically Series A or earlier) that are building innovative products on top of TiDB Cloud. You must be using or planning to use TiDB Cloud for your primary database.

items.q: How do I receive the $100,000 in credits?
items.a: Once your application is approved, the credits will be applied to your TiDB Cloud account. The credits are typically valid for 12 months from the date of approval.
No. The program is designed to help you grow. While we encourage long-term partnerships, there is no mandatory commitment to stay on TiDB Cloud after the credits are exhausted.

items.q: What kind of technical support is included?
items.a: Startups get access to a dedicated Slack channel with TiDB engineers, priority ticket handling, and quarterly architecture reviews to ensure your system is optimized for scale.

sections.title: Ready to Launch Your Startup?
sections.subtitle: Join hundreds of innovative companies scaling with TiDB Cloud. Apply today and get $100,000 in credits.
